title: US threatens sanctions against Chinese AI models over IP theft | TechCrunch
summary: The statement comes as Chinese models — most recently Moonshot AI’s Kimi K3 — are gaining in capabilities and popularity, threatening to harm the business models of top American AI firms like OpenAI and Anthropic, as well as their abilities to raise…
